recipes.title: Local private route gate
recipes.promise: A small route policy starter that keeps private context on approved local routes.

recipes.title: Local cascade with cloud fallback
recipes.promise: Start on a local model, then show the policy boundary where a larger managed fallback is allowed only after route checks pass.

recipes.title: Review model escalation ladder
recipes.promise: Keep normal turns on a local model, then transition the session to a review-capable managed model after related stream matches accumulate.

recipes.title: Local tool loop watch
recipes.promise: A starter tool-governance recipe for reviewing repeated write-capable tool calls.

recipes.title: Local basic stream retry
recipes.promise: A simple TTSR-style stream guard: hold a small horizon, retry once on a prohibited phrase, then release the fixed attempt.

recipes.title: Output artifact review
recipes.promise: Use a cheap draft route for the answer but require artifact evidence before accepting a completion claim.
